speaker: GOWER
text: To sing a song that old was sung,

speaker: GOWER
text: From ashes ancient Gower is come,

speaker: GOWER
text: Assuming man’s infirmities

speaker: GOWER
text: To glad your ear and please your eyes.

speaker: GOWER
text: It hath been sung at festivals,

speaker: GOWER
text: On ember eves and holy days,

speaker: GOWER
text: And lords and ladies in their lives

speaker: GOWER
text: Have read it for restoratives.

speaker: GOWER
text: The purchase is to make men glorious,

speaker: GOWER
text: Et bonum quo antiquius, eo melius.

speaker: GOWER
text: If you, born in these latter times

speaker: GOWER
text: When wit’s more ripe, accept my rhymes,

speaker: GOWER
text: And that to hear an old man sing

speaker: GOWER
text: May to your wishes pleasure bring,

speaker: GOWER
text: I life would wish, and that I might

speaker: GOWER
text: Waste it for you like taper light.

speaker: GOWER
text: This Antioch, then: Antiochus the Great

speaker: GOWER
text: Built up this city for his chiefest seat,

speaker: GOWER
text: The fairest in all Syria.

speaker: GOWER
text: I tell you what mine authors say.

speaker: GOWER
text: This king unto him took a peer,

speaker: GOWER
text: Who died and left a female heir

speaker: GOWER
text: So buxom, blithe, and full of face

speaker: GOWER
text: As heaven had lent her all his grace;

speaker: GOWER
text: With whom the father liking took

speaker: GOWER
text: And her to incest did provoke.

speaker: GOWER
text: Bad child, worse father! To entice his own

speaker: GOWER
text: To evil should be done by none.

speaker: GOWER
text: But custom what they did begin

speaker: GOWER
text: Was with long use accounted no sin.

speaker: GOWER
text: The beauty of this sinful dame

speaker: GOWER
text: Made many princes thither frame

speaker: GOWER
text: To seek her as a bedfellow,

speaker: GOWER
text: In marriage pleasures playfellow;

speaker: GOWER
text: Which to prevent he made a law

speaker: GOWER
text: To keep her still, and men in awe,

speaker: GOWER
text: That whoso asked her for his wife,

speaker: GOWER
text: His riddle told not, lost his life.

speaker: GOWER
text: So for her many a wight did die,

speaker: GOWER
text: As yon grim looks do testify.

speaker: GOWER
text: What now ensues, to the judgment of your eye

speaker: GOWER
text: I give my cause, who best can justify.
